title: Search photos
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

steps.text: Microsoft's Location Service Your photos include latitude and longitude as part of their embedded data. Microsoft uses this information to determine where your photo or video was taken. Microsoft does not store this information. You can find out more information about Microsoft's Location technology here .
